description_long: This object is a single, thick slice of rustic bread with a golden-brown, slightly rough crust encircling a soft, pale interior. The crust appears uneven and textured, with some areas showing a deeper brown coloration and a few lighter flour-dusted patches. The interior is airy and porous, with small, irregular holes typical of artisanal or country-style loaves. The slice is roughly oval in shape, with a natural, hand-cut appearance rather than a machine-sliced uniformity. There are no visible seeds, toppings, or branding on the surface. The bread looks fresh and ready to be eaten, suitable for use in sandwiches or as a side in an urban park or street food setting.
description: A thick, rustic slice of bread with a golden-brown, textured crust and a soft, airy white interior. The slice is irregularly shaped and appears hand-cut.
description_view_0: The front view shows the rounded, uneven crust and the porous, pale interior with a slightly domed top surface.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the thickness of the slice and the contrast between the golden crust and the soft, white interior.
description_view_2: The rear angle reveals more of the crust's rough texture and the irregular, hand-cut edge of the bread.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the bottom and side crust, showing some darker and lighter patches, and the overall oval shape of the slice.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is uneven and rustic, with a rough, natural texture and some flour-dusted areas. There are no visible scores, seeds, or decorative markings, giving it a handmade, artisanal appearance.
